positive: A stylized, minimalist silhouette design of a playful arctic fox playfully catching a glowing firefly. The fox is rendered with smooth, geometric curves and a sophisticated, artistic feel, emphasizing negative space. Composition is centered and balanced, suitable for a repeating apparel pattern. Style should be retro-modern linework with a limited color palette of deep teal, cream, and warm gold accents. High contrast, crisp lines, perfect for direct-to-garment printing. Focus on clean, scalable vector graphic aesthetics.
